recommendations.title: Forbidden Planet
recommendations.overview: Starship C57D travels to planet Altair 4 in search of the crew of spaceship "Bellerophon," a scientific expedition that has been missing for twenty years. They find themselves unwelcome by the expedition's lone survivor and warned of destruction by a

recommendations.title: Phoenix Forgotten
recommendations.overview: Twenty years after three teenagers disappeared in the wake of mysterious lights appearing above Phoenix, Arizona, unseen footage from that night has been discovered, chronicling the final hours of their fateful expedition.

recommendations.title: It! The Terror from Beyond Space
recommendations.overview: The first manned expedition to Mars is invaded by an unknown life form, which stows away on the rescue ship.

recommendations.title: Woman in the Moon
recommendations.overview: A scientist discovers that there's gold on the moon. He builds a rocket to fly there, but there's too much rivalry among the crew to have a successful expedition.

recommendations.title: Project Gemini
recommendations.overview: After depleting Earth's resources for centuries, humankind's survival requires an exodus to outer space. An international expedition is quickly formed to find a suitable new planet, but when plans go awry, the crew is suddenly stranded without power

recommendations.title: The Summit of the Gods
recommendations.overview: A photojournalist's obsessive quest for the truth about the first expedition to Mt. Everest leads him to search for an esteemed climber who went missing.

recommendations.title: Gravity
recommendations.overview: Dr Ryan Stone, an engineer on her first space mission, and Matt Kowalski, an astronaut on his final expedition, have to survive in space after they are hit by debris while spacewalking.

recommendations.title: Ad Astra
recommendations.overview: The near future, a time when both hope and hardships drive humanity to look to the stars and beyond. While a mysterious phenomenon menaces to destroy life on planet Earth, astronaut Roy McBride undertakes a mission across the immensity of space and i

recommendations.title: Superdeep
recommendations.overview: In 1984, a Russian research team goes below the surface to find out what secret the world's deepest borehole is hiding. On their expedition, something unexpectedly gruesome awaits the researchers.

recommendations.title: Against the Ice
recommendations.overview: In 1909, two explorers fight to survive after they're left behind while on a Danish expedition in ice-covered Greenland.
